title: Strict Dynamic Proxy
description: Implement a class 'Proxy' that takes an object and a list of 'allowed_attrs'. It should only allow access to attributes in the allowed list via __getattr__. Raise AttributeError otherwise.
test_script:
import unittest
from proxy import Proxy
class Obj: a=1; b=2
class TestProxy(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_access(self):
        p = Proxy(Obj(), ['a'])
        self.assertEqual(p.a, 1)
        with self.assertRaises(AttributeError): p.b
